steps.title: Find the slope of f(x)
steps.content:
Using two points from the table, $(-4, 0)$ and $\left(-\frac{19}{5}, 1\right)$:
$$m = \frac{1 - 0}{-\frac{19}{5} - (-4)} = \frac{1}{\frac{1}{5}} = 5$$

steps.title: Find f(x) and apply h(x) = f(x) - 13
steps.content:
With slope 5 and point $(-4, 0)$: $0 = 5(-4) + b$ gives $b = 20$, so $f(x) = 5x + 20$.
Therefore: $$h(x) = f(x) - 13 = (5x + 20) - 13 = 5x + 7$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
